title: nephrodium filix-mas var. paleaceum
intro: Nephrodium filix-mas var. paleaceum, commonly known as the pale-stemmed male fern, is a variety of the male fern plant, which belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium filix-mas var. paleaceum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and relieve pain, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the fronds, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
